Dear Newcastle

I publish a newsletter every month discussing my work as the MP for Newcastle Central and West: Dear Newcastle. You can find copies of the newsletter here on the website.

Newsletters

Constituency Corner

As part of my commitment to transparency, I publish statistics on the top issues constituents contact me about.

You can find these by searching for “Issues raised by constituents” or using the feed below.

I'm here to help

As your MP, I can take up issues with the Government, Newcastle City Council, and other organisations on your behalf. I can also raise them in Parliament.
Get help with an issue

Contact my Newcastle office

Phone: 0191 232 5838

Email: chi.onwurah.mp@parliament.uk

Contact my Westminster office

Phone: 020 7219 7114

Email: chi.onwurah.mp@parliament.uk
